name: Example OLAP Workload
description: Sample analytical workload with aggregations and scans

queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*), AVG(k), SUM(k), MIN(k), MAX(k) FROM sbtest1
SELECT (k % 100) as bucket, COUNT(*), AVG(k) FROM sbtest1 GROUP BY bucket
SELECT COUNT(*), AVG(k) FROM sbtest1 WHERE k > 50000
SELECT * FROM sbtest1 WHERE k BETWEEN 10000 AND 20000 ORDER BY k
SELECT (k / 1000) as range, COUNT(*), MIN(k), MAX(k), AVG(k) FROM sbtest1 WHERE k > 10000 GROUP BY range
SELECT MIN(k), MAX(k), AVG(k), STDDEV(k) FROM sbtest1
